zh.Yelden, Bedford, Bedfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾也爾登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Albreda Espec於大約1092年出生在英國越可爾吉可哈姆時，她的父親Walter Espec25歲，母親Adeline de Beauchamp18歲。她於大約1110年與Geoffrey de Trailly在英國英格蘭貝德福爾也爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1129年享年39歲。

zh-hans.Yelden, Bedford, Bedfordshire, England: 英国英格兰貝德福爾也爾登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albreda Espec于大约1092年出生在英国越可爾吉可哈姆时，她的父亲Walter Espec25岁，母亲Adeline de Beauchamp18岁。她于大约1110年与Geoffrey de Trailly在英国英格兰貝德福爾也爾登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1129年享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Espec
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: most likely a topographic name for someone who lived by or owned an area of pasture, derived from Middle High German esban, espan ‘pasture’ (Bavarian and Swabian Espan).
North German and Danish: from a variant of the personal name Jesper, Danish and Low German form of Kasper and Kaspar , equivalents of Casper .

variants.name: Esber
meanings: Arabic (Syria and Lebanon): from Asbir, of unknown meaning, used as a surname. Derivation from Arabic aṣbar ‘very patient’ is linguistically improbable (ṣ and s are not interchangeable). This surname is found among both Muslims and Christians. Compare Esper 4 and Asper 2.

variants.name: Kasper
meanings: German, Danish, and Polish; Slovak (mainly Kašper); Czech and Slovenian (also Kašper): from the personal names Kasper (German, Danish, and Polish) and Kašper (Slovak, Czech, and Slovenian variant of Gašpar, Kašpar, and Gašper, respectively), equivalents of Casper . In North America, this surname is also a shortened and altered form of especially Polish patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Kasprzak . See also Kaspar , Gaspar , and Gasper .

nameMeanings.name: Albreda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Elfreda  , but now probably taken as a feminine equivalent of   Alfred .

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Albreda Espec was born about 1092, in Kirkham, Yorkshire, England, her father, Walter Espec, was 25 and her mother, Adeline de Beauchamp, was 18. She married Geoffrey de Trailly about 1110, in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died about 1129, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albreda Espec est née environ 1092, à Kirkham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Walter Espec, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Adeline de Beauchamp, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey de Trailly environ 1110, à Yelden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1129, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albreda Espec um 1092 in Kirkham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Espec 25 und ihre Mutter Adeline de Beauchamp 18. Sie hat um 1110 in Yelden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Geoffrey de Trailly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb um 1129 im Alter von 39 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albreda Espec è nata il circa 1092 nel Kirkham, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Walter Espec, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Adeline de Beauchamp, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey de Trailly circa 1110, nel Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1129, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Albreda Especが約1092年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルクハムで生まれた時，父Walter Especは25歳，母Adeline de Beauchampは18歳であった。約1110年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアイエルデンでGeoffrey de Traillyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1129年に39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Albreda Espec(이)가 대략 1092년 영국 요르크실르 커카에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Espec(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeline de Beauchamp(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1110년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 옐든에서 Geoffrey de Trailly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1129년 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albreda Espec nasceu aproximadamente 1092, em Kirkham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Espec, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Adeline de Beauchamp, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey de Trailly aproximadamente 1110, em Yelden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1129, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albreda Espec родилась около 1092 г. в местности кирхам, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Espec было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeline de Beauchamp, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey de Trailly около 1110 г. в местности иелден, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла около 1129 г. в возрасте 39 лет.
